name: Human-in-the-Loop Email Responder
description: Fetch recent emails from Gmail, use Claude AI to draft replies, and post the drafts to Slack for human review before sending. A simple but effective email triage and response system.

source.originalName: A very simple Human in the Loop email response system using AI and IMAP

gmailListKey.description: Gmail connection key for listing emails

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post draft replies for review

maxEmails.description: Maximum number of recent emails to process

emailLabel.description: Gmail label to filter emails (e.g. INBOX, UNREAD)

replyTone.description: Tone for drafted replies (e.g. 'formal', 'casual', 'professional and friendly')

steps.name: Compile email data for AI processing
Build Claude prompt for email reply drafting
Post draft replies to Slack for review
